data.label: TDS 腾讯端服务跨平台框架
data.description: 包含面向客户端开发、原生性能的 Kuikly 框架和面向前端开发的 Hippy 框架。支持移动端（含鸿蒙）、Web、小程序多平台跨端开发，提供极致的开发调试体验，助力业务提升研发生产力。Kuikly、Hippy作为腾讯端服务（Tencent Device-oriented Service，简称TDS）产品联盟的核心成员，将持续推动跨端开发的技术创新和生态建设。

data.label: TDS 腾讯端服务跨平台框架
data.description: Includes the Kuikly framework for client-side development with native performance and the Hippy framework for front-end development. It supports cross-platform development across mobile platforms (including HarmonyOS), Web, and mini programs, providing an excellent development and debugging experience to help businesses improve R&D productivity. As core members of the Tencent Device-oriented Service (TDS) product alliance, Kuikly and Hippy will continue to drive technical innovation and ecosystem development in cross-platform development.
